div.h2: Implementation Spec: Lock-Free Hazard Pointer Acquisition
div.p: Ref: "Hazard Pointers: Safe Memory Reclamation for Lock-Free Objects" (M. Michael)

g.text: ⚠️ WHY THIS MATTERS: ABA & UAF PREVENTION

div.p: sizeof(HazardPointer) = 8 bytes memory_order = seq_cst (for Set/Validate) Page Alignment = 4KB (Not required)
ptr = source.load(memory_order_relaxed) Local register now holds 0x1000.
hp_slot[i].store(ptr, memory_order_seq_cst) Invariant: Node A is now "announced" to reclaimer.
if (source.load(seq_cst) != ptr) retry() Ensures node wasn't retired before the HP store.
Validated! T1 can now safely dereference ptr. Reclaimer will skip 0x1000 during scan().
Race Detected. Another thread updated source to 0x2000 and may have already retired 0x1000.

ol.li: T2 removes A, puts A on retired list.
T2 calls scan(). T1 hasn't published HP yet.
T2 sees no HP for A. T2 FREES A.
T1 accesses A -> USE AFTER FREE.

div.p: The Validation Fix: At step 4, T1 sees source != A. T1 knows its protection might have arrived too late. T1 drops A and retries.
